changes.value:
After all frontend callers are migrated to execute_command, remove the old individual mutation commands.

Remove from commands.rs:
- `update_entity_field`
- `move_task`
- `add_task`
- `update_tag`
- `untag_task`
- `reorder_columns`
- `delete_task`, `delete_tag`, `delete_column`, `delete_actor`, `delete_swimlane`
- `delete_attachment`
- `undo_operation`, `redo_operation`
- `show_tag_context_menu`
- `ColumnOrder` struct (folded into execute_command args parsing)

Remove from main.rs invoke_handler:
- All the above command registrations

Remove from state.rs:
- `context_tag` field from AppState (no longer needed)

Remove from menu.rs:
- `handle_tag_menu` function
- tag-specific match arms in `handle_menu_event`

- [ ] Remove old command functions from commands.rs
- [ ] Remove from invoke_handler in main.rs
- [ ] Remove context_tag from AppState
- [ ] Remove tag menu handling from menu.rs
- [ ] Verify no remaining references to old command names
- [ ] Run tests
Rust: Remove old mutation commands + cleanup

Remove from menu.rs:

+After all frontend callers are migrated to execute_command, remove the old individual mutation commands.

Remove from commands.rs:
- `update_entity_field`
- `move_task`
- `add_task`
- `update_tag`
- `untag_task`
- `reorder_columns`
- `delete_task`, `delete_tag`, `delete_column`, `delete_actor`, `delete_swimlane`
- `delete_attachment`

Remove from main.rs invoke_handler:

- [ ] Remove old command functions from commands.rs
- [ ] Remove from invoke_handler in main.rs
- [ ] Remove context_tag from AppState
- [ ] Remove tag menu handling from menu.rs

Tests:
- [ ] `cargo build` — clean compile with no dead code warnings for removed functions
- [ ] `cargo test` — all existing Rust tests pass
- [ ] `grep verify: no invoke("move_task")` — no frontend references to old command names
- [ ] `grep verify: no invoke("add_task")` — same
- [ ] `grep verify: no invoke("update_entity_field")` — same
- [ ] `grep verify: no invoke("untag_task")` — same
- [ ] `grep verify: no invoke("reorder_columns")` — same
- [ ] `grep verify: no invoke("delete_task")` etc. — same for all delete_* commands
- [ ] `grep verify: no invoke("show_tag_context_menu")` — same
- [ ] `grep verify: no context_tag` — removed from state.rs
- [ ] `npm test` — all frontend tests pass (confirming no stale references)
\ No newline at end of file
